name: Tomebreaker Scroll
desc: Grants +50 Hit/Avoid when against foe wielding Light, Anima, or Dark magic. <red>({e:self.value.value // 2 if has_skill('Lord','Bargain') else self.value.value}G)</>

name: Fury Scroll
desc: Grants +3 to all stats except for HP, Mov, and Con. Unit receives 5 damage after combat. <red>({e:self.value.value // 2 if has_skill('Lord','Bargain') else self.value.value}G)</>

name: Wings Of Mercy Scroll
desc: Unit can warp to a tile adjacent to an ally who is at 50% Max HP or less. <red>({e:self.value.value // 2 if has_skill('Lord','Bargain') else self.value.value}G)</>

name: Air Orders Scroll
desc: Unit can warp to a tile adjacent to a flying ally. <red>({e:self.value.value // 2 if has_skill('Lord','Bargain') else self.value.value}G)</>

name: Infantry Orders Scroll
desc: Unit can warp to a tile adjacent to an infantry ally. <red>({e:self.value.value // 2 if has_skill('Lord','Bargain') else self.value.value}G)</>

name: Calvary Orders Scroll
desc: Unit can warp to a tile adjacent to an ally on horseback. <red>({e:self.value.value // 2 if has_skill('Lord','Bargain') else self.value.value}G)</>

name: Wary Fighter Scroll
desc: Unit and target cannot perform follow-up attacks. <red>({e:self.value.value // 2 if has_skill('Lord','Bargain') else self.value.value}G)</>

name: Intimidator Scroll
desc: Enemy deals 3 less damage if unit's Strength > enemy's Strength. <red>({e:self.value.value // 2 if has_skill('Lord','Bargain') else self.value.value}G)</>

name: Intellectual Scroll
desc: Enemy deals 3 less damage if unit's Magic > enemy's Magic. <red>({e:self.value.value // 2 if has_skill('Lord','Bargain') else self.value.value}G)</>

name: Rampart Scroll
desc: Enemy takes 3 more damage if unit's Defense > enemy's Defense. <red>({e:self.value.value // 2 if has_skill('Lord','Bargain') else self.value.value}G)</>

name: Ethereal Scroll
desc: Enemy takes 3 more damage if unit's Resistance > enemy's Resistance. <red>({e:self.value.value // 2 if has_skill('Lord','Bargain') else self.value.value}G)</>

name: Axebuster
desc: Nullifies the weapon triangle.

name: Hunter Bow

name: Cleave Bow
